# Hashed requirements for subumbra-agent.
# pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt
# Hashes cover all linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 wheels (the only platforms
# the python:3.12-slim base image ships for) plus the sdist.
cryptography==48.0.0 \
